summary: Iteration 70 - Testing payment-related sync with ledger (cashbook). Verified Gunny Bags and Purchase Vouchers show 'Paid' badge + History icon for fully paid items (NOT 'Payment Karein' button). All 10 backend tests passed. Frontend UI fully verified.

issues: Minor hydration warning in console - whitespace in table row - non-critical

seed_data_creation: None - Used existing Shyam Sarma entry for Rs.8500 which shows as Paid with Rs.6500 payment history (2 payments: Rs.4500 + Rs.2000)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Payment sync with ledger is working. Gunny Bags tab shows 'Paid' badge (green) + Clock/History icon for fully paid items (balance=0). Payment Karein button hidden when ledger_balance <= 0. Same logic applies to Purchase Vouchers. The history endpoint /api/voucher-payment/history/{party_name}?party_type=... returns payment history from ledger. Note: The tabs use different names: 'Truck Payments', 'Truck Owner', 'Agent Payments', 'Diesel Account', 'Local Party', 'Gunny Bags'.

backend_tests: GET /api/gunny-bags - returns entries with ledger_paid and ledger_balance fields
GET /api/purchase-book - returns vouchers with ledger_paid and ledger_balance fields
GET /api/truck-payments - returns list of truck payments
GET /api/agent-payments - returns list of agent payments
GET /api/diesel-accounts - returns list of diesel account entries
GET /api/local-party/transactions - returns list of local party transactions

Shyam Sarma entry (Rs.8500, Paid Rs.8500) shows GREEN 'Paid' badge - ✓ Verified
Shyam Sarma entry shows Clock/History icon - ✓ Verified
Shyam Sarma entry does NOT show 'Payment Karein' button - ✓ Correct (hidden for paid items)
Click History icon opens Payment History dialog - ✓ Works
Payment History dialog shows 2 payments (+Rs.4500, +Rs.2000) - ✓ Verified
Balram - Gokul entries show 'Auto' badge (linked entries, no payment buttons) - ✓ Correct
Vouchers > Purchase Vouchers tab loads correctly - ✓ Works (empty list 'Koi purchase voucher nahi mila')
All Payments sub-tabs load: Truck Payments ✓, Truck Owner ✓, Agent Payments ✓, Diesel Account ✓, Local Party ✓, Gunny Bags ✓
